cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. Today is her 16th birthday. We need to find the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe I can check each one. First, the last day of February is the 29th, right? Because February usually has 28 days, but in a leap year, it has
